error.forecast_query_required: Enter a forecast place search term.
error.forecast_query_too_short: Enter at least 2 letters or an exact postal code / point ID.
error.forecast_query_metadata_unavailable: Forecast places are temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
error.forecast_query_not_found: No matching forecast places were found.
error.invalid_forecast_point: Select one of the matching forecast places.

user.title: Forecast Place
user.description: Search a forecast place by name, or enter an exact postal code or MeteoSwiss point ID. ZIP codes, locations and points of interest such as peaks, passes and huts are supported. You will confirm the selected forecast place in the next step.

reconfigure.title: Stations
reconfigure.description: Update the weather and pollen stations for the existing forecast place.

data.stationCode: Weather station for current weather state

forecast_pick.title: Select Forecast Place
forecast_pick.description: Choose the forecast place you want to use, or select Search again.

details.title: Stations
details.description: Choose the weather and pollen stations.

data.stationCode: Weather station for current weather state

missing_forecast_point.title: The stored forecast place for {entry_title} is no longer available
missing_forecast_point.description: The saved forecast place ID `{post_code}` can no longer be found in the latest MeteoSwiss forecast metadata. Remove the Swiss Weather entry and add it again to choose a new forecast place.

missing_weather_station.title: The stored weather station for {entry_title} is no longer available
missing_weather_station.description: The saved weather station code `{station_code}` can no longer be found in the latest MeteoSwiss station metadata. Reconfigure the Swiss Weather entry to pick a new weather station or remove it.

missing_pollen_station.title: The stored pollen station for {entry_title} is no longer available
missing_pollen_station.description: The saved pollen station code `{station_code}` can no longer be found in the latest MeteoSwiss pollen metadata. Reconfigure the Swiss Weather entry to pick a new pollen station or disable pollen for this entry.
